title: Guidonia lucida
taxonomy: Guidonia lucida is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a member of the genus Guidonia, which is a part of the family Rubiaceae. The species is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Guidonia lucida is often found growing in shaded and humid environments. The classification of the species is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids, Order: Gentianales, Family: Rubiaceae, Genus: Guidonia, Species: G. lucida.
